name: create_ui_element
description: Create a UI element as a child of an existing Canvas or UI GameObject. Supports creating Text (TextMeshPro), Image, Panel, Button, and empty RectTransform containers. The Button type creates an Image with a Button component and a child Text in one step. Sets up RectTransform anchoring, pivot, position, and size. For text elements, uses TextMeshProUGUI.

name.description: The name of the UI element GameObject.

parent_name.description: The name of the parent GameObject (must have a RectTransform, e.g. a Canvas or another UI element).

element_type.description: The type of UI element to create. 'Text' adds TextMeshProUGUI, 'Image' adds Image, 'Panel' adds Image with semi-transparent background, 'Button' creates Image + Button + child Text in one step, 'Empty' creates an empty RectTransform container.

text.description: The text content for Text and Button elements. Default 'Text' for Text, 'Button' for Button.

font_size.description: Font size for Text and Button elements. Default 36 for Text, 24 for Button.

text_color_r.description: Text color red channel (0-1). Default 1 (white) for Text, 0.2 (dark) for Button.

text_color_g.description: Text color green channel (0-1). Default 1 (white) for Text, 0.2 (dark) for Button.

text_color_b.description: Text color blue channel (0-1). Default 1 (white) for Text, 0.2 (dark) for Button.

text_alignment.description: Text alignment for Text and Button elements. Default 'Center'.

image_color_r.description: Image/Panel/Button background color red channel (0-1). Default 1.

image_color_g.description: Image/Panel/Button background color green channel (0-1). Default 1.

image_color_b.description: Image/Panel/Button background color blue channel (0-1). Default 1.

image_color_a.description: Image/Panel/Button background color alpha channel (0-1). Default 1 for Image/Button, 0.4 for Panel.
